metrics.meaning: Synthetic admissions in the selected case window.
Share of encounters with at least one out-of-bounds operational delay signal.
Number of grouped action signals a shift huddle needs to review.
Estimated excess bed-hours above expected operating thresholds.
How much patient-level evidence is compressed into shift-level signals.
A unit/day pattern above expected operating variation.
Sorting score for the shift huddle worklist.
Patient-level sorting aid, not a clinical severity score.

signals.meaning: Patient appears medically stable but is waiting for LTC, rehab, or alternate-level placement.
Discharge depends on home-care confirmation or community support setup.
Readiness crosses a period with reduced service availability.
PT/OT or therapy assessment takes longer than expected for a discharge-dependent case.
Discharge or transfer waits on transport coordination.
Mobility-limited or vulnerable patients wait for safe movement support.
Medication reconciliation or discharge medication readiness delays discharge.
CT completion or reporting appears discharge-dependent and delayed.
MRI access or reporting appears discharge-dependent and delayed.
Blood collection, processing, or result release appears discharge-dependent and delayed.
ECG completion or interpretation appears discharge-dependent and delayed.
Final diagnostic completion, sign-off, or consultant interpretation appears to hold discharge.
Nursing readiness checklist or discharge screening is delayed.
Social work assessment is delayed for a discharge-dependent case.
A delay signal exists but no single dependency explains it.

datasets.name: patient_journey_events.parquet
datasets.description: Journey timestamps, transitions, and dependency events.

datasets.name: delay_resolution_actions.csv
datasets.description: Owner, evidence, priority, and suggested next step.

datasets.name: control_chart_points.csv
datasets.description: Daily signal-rate points and review thresholds.

datasets.name: ranked_actionable_signals.csv
datasets.description: Impact-ranked delay reasons by recoverable bed-hours.
